# GeyserBrain

> Smart home. Soft life. Check, control, schedule and understand what your geyser costs — all from WhatsApp.

GeyserBrain brings your home online one device at a time, starting with your geyser. You talk to it in plain language on WhatsApp — no new app, no dashboard, no manual. Ask it to heat up, check what it's costing, or set a schedule, and it just does it.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, WhatsApp demo, benefits, how it works, pricing, and FAQ.
